ecosystem.name: engineering-quality-governor
ecosystem.cleanup_policy: Keep these paths when migrating the reusable ecosystem; remove them only when uninstalling the governor.

project_scoped_assets.reason: Project-specific quality configuration and audit-control folder for rn-gestor.
project_scoped_assets.secrets_policy: No real secrets; project-control records may contain project-sensitive planning data.
project_scoped_assets.cleanup: For migration cleanup, remove project-scoped files only after exporting required project documentation; in AGENTS.md remove only the Engineering Quality Governor section.

project_scoped_tools.reason: Supabase MCP scoped to rn-gestor project ref for schema, migration, RLS, advisors, database inspection, and explicitly approved remote maintenance.
project_scoped_tools.secrets_policy: No token stored in repository or Codex config; Codex reads bearer token from SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN. The project-scoped URL is write-enabled, so use only for explicit maintenance and keep the token out of commits.
project_scoped_tools.cleanup: Run codex mcp remove supabase-rn-gestor and unset SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN when removing this project-scoped MCP.

standard_ecosystem_tools.reason: Reusable engineering governance plugin, skill, references, templates, and scripts.
standard_ecosystem_tools.cleanup: Do not delete during project-specific cleanup unless uninstalling the ecosystem.

standard_ecosystem_tools.reason: Reusable skill for code reuse discovery, clone detection, and lean architecture composition prospecting.
standard_ecosystem_tools.cleanup: Do not delete during project-specific cleanup unless removing the reusable ecosystem skill.
